title: Vice President, Product Business Development & Product Management
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Define and execute the regional platform and product strategy across CPaaS, Telco APIs, AI-enabled solutions, and new digital products to drive long-term growth and sustainability.
  • Engage closely with company's Operators at senior and working levels to identify business needs, co-create initiatives, and support successful market launches.
  • Lead product planning, roadmap development, and go-to-market strategies in alignment with company’s commercial priorities and regional market dynamics.
  • Identify, evaluate, and manage strategic partners, vendors, and ecosystem players to introduce differentiated solutions and accelerate time-to-market.
  • Drive adoption of regional initiatives by leading workshops, strategy sessions, and business planning forums across the Bridge alliance.
  • Develop compelling value propositions to strengthen engagement with existing company's and attract new members and strategic alliance partners.
  • Actively pursue regional enterprise and channel-led opportunities, working jointly with companies to win and deliver cross-market deals.
  • Establish and lead a high-performing platform business team (4–5 members), providing clear direction, capability development, and performance management.

Key Qualifications

  • Degree in Engineering, Marketing and / or International Business
  • Broad knowledge of telecommunications products and services development and marketing
  • Knowledge in products such as CPaaS, Telco API, AI, etc.
  • Knowledge in pricing and marketing from a services industry.
  • 15 years of working experience from the telecommunications industry
  • 5 years of product management experience
  • 5 years in leadership and people management role
  • At least 3-5 years working experience in Asia.

Interested applicants please send your resume to venessagoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Venessa Goh Wee Ni

R24124686

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
